sourceText: No one has ever become poor by giving. Generosity is a monumental source of wealth. Your happiness increases as you share it.

Generosity is a mindset of abundance. The more you give of your time, empathy, and resources, the more you expand your capacity for joy. Don't hoard your light; let it shine on others, for a flame loses nothing by lighting another candle.
Paper has more patience than people. Write your truth. A monumental record is the only thing that can defeat the silence of time. Your voice matters.

Silence is the ally of oblivion. Giants understand their thoughts and experiences hold monumental value; entrusting your truth to paper or record ensures your essence survives beyond physical life. Honesty is your greatest legacy.

Enduring the monumental physical and spiritual trauma of being owned as property. Facing the terrifying risk of death or re-enslavement during his escape and the monumental challenge of proving his intellectual capacity to a world that was scientifically and legally committed to his inferiority.

Transcended the chains of his birth to become one of the most influential thinkers of the 19th century, proving that the mind is the ultimate liberator. Established a monumental standard for civil rights activism, showing that a giant’s impact is found in their refusal to remain silent in the face of evil.
Knowledge makes a man unfit to be a slave. Education is the pathway from slavery to freedom. Arm your mind.

Ignorance is the foundation of oppression. A giant understands their greatest liberation comes from mastering information and critical thought; by dedicating yourself to monumental education, you become an unmanipulatable target. Your mind is your first and last fortress.
Without struggle, there is no progress. Power concedes nothing without a demand. Agitate, agitate, agitate for your monumental vision.

Comfort is the enemy of justice. A giant understands that growth requires friction; by courageously facing obstacles and demanding a higher standard for yourself and your community, you compel the universe to evolve. Do not fear the struggle; fear stagnation.
I would unite with anybody to do right and be divided from anybody to do wrong. Principles are the monumental anchor of the soul. Choose your allies wisely.

On the Majesty of Principles: Integrity is non-negotiable. A giant understands their associations define their character; by holding a monumental commitment to what is right, regardless of political or personal pressure, you achieve unimpeachable clarity of purpose. Be a person of your word.

Enduring the monumental physical pain of a fractured skull and the lifelong disability of narcolepsy caused by an overseer's violence. Facing the constant threat of capture and execution as a 'wanted' fugitive with a massive bounty on her head, while navigating hundreds of miles of hostile territory in total darkness.

Transcended her status as a disabled fugitive to become a monumental military and social leader, proving that courage is independent of physical stature. Established a monumental standard for sacrifice, showing that a giant’s impact is found in their willingness to go back for those who are still trapped.
